## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change and the motivation. -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] feat: new feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] fix: bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] perf: performance improvement
- [ ] refactor: non-behavioural code change
- [ ] docs: documentation
- [ ] test: tests only
- [ ] build / ci: build, tooling, CI
- [ ] chore: housekeeping
- [ ] breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] Commits are atomic, signed, and DCO signed-off
- [ ] Branch is rebased on `main`
- [ ] CI is green
- [ ] No commented-out code, debug prints, or stray TODOs
- [ ] ASCII only in committed text
